subject: Free Summer Reading Kickoff This Saturday
snippet: Join us for a free family kickoff with books, crafts, and signups for summer reading.
body_excerpt: River City Library invites families to the Summer Reading Kickoff on Saturday, May 16 from 10:00 AM to 1:00 PM at the Main Branch, 42 Oak Street. The event includes free books for kids while supplies last, craft tables, and registration for the summer reading program. Learn more at rivercitylibrary.org/summer.
